reports.title: HTML Fundamentals
reports.previousOpening: This field links are a fundamental aspect of is the Web. Once this piece is clear, neighboring concepts become easier to place.
reports.newOpening: HTML is the most basic building block of the Web. It matters because knowing what it is—and is not—changes real decisions. You encounter it in everyday products, tools, and decisions—often before the formal name sticks.
